headline: Exxon Mobil (XOM) Faces New Questions As Strait Of Hormuz Reopens
summary: A US Iran peace agreement has been reached, opening the way for a phased reopening of the Strait of Hormuz. The Strait of Hormuz is a key global oil transit route, and the agreement is linked with sharp oil price volatility. NYSE:XOM is assessing how resumed flows and changing trade routes could affect production plans, inventories, and cash flows. For Exxon Mobil, a global integrated oil and gas company, the Strait of Hormuz matters because it sits at the heart of seaborne crude flows out...

headline: BofA upgrades Exxon to Buy as shares lag despite war-driven upside
summary: Investing.com -- Bank of America upgraded ExxonMobil shares to Buy from Neutral, arguing that the stock’s pullback from its highs has left it trading at an attractive valuation regardless of whether a peace deal between the U.S. and Iran materializes.
